name: io.github.apache/shardingsphere-mcp
title: Apache ShardingSphere MCP
description: Standalone MCP runtime for Apache ShardingSphere metadata-first discovery, preview-before-execute SQL, and encrypt/mask rule workflows

environmentVariables.name: SHARDINGSPHERE_MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Launch the container in stdio mode for MCP clients.

environmentVariables.name: SHARDINGSPHERE_MCP_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Optional absolute config path inside the OCI container. Mount the YAML file before setting this value.

environmentVariables.name: SHARDINGSPHERE_MCP_TRANSPORT
environmentVariables.description: Launch the container in Streamable HTTP mode for local or remote MCP clients.

environmentVariables.name: SHARDINGSPHERE_MCP_CONFIG
environmentVariables.description: Optional absolute config path inside the OCI container. Mount the YAML file before setting this value.
